title: AG-UI event parser and reducers for native chat
instructions: Implement SSE parsing that supports multi-line data blocks.
Handle lifecycle, text, tool, state, custom and error events.
Render compact tool trace and user-safe errors.
acceptance: Assistant response is built from TEXT_MESSAGE_*.
TOOL_CALL_* events update a tool trace node.
RUN_ERROR unlocks the form and displays a safe error.
Empty stream is handled as an error.
